side_effects.description: Severe nausea and vomiting after accidental overdose of 6.5mg; required Zofran to manage
Gastrointestinal issues anticipated and experienced following accidental overdose

protocol_notes: OP is under physician direction and takes multiple injectable medications. Normal dose is 1.5mg twice weekly (15 units). Accidentally took 50 units (approximately 6.5mg) in two days, mistaking Reta vial for Gonadorelin. Previously used semaglutide and reported delayed GI sides 3-4 days post-injection on that compound. Used Zofran (Ondansetron) to manage nausea after the accidental overdose.
